actions.text: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.
Hold the stable panel with one gripper contact on each side of the horizontal midpoint crease.

actions.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease
actions.text: Pinch the free panel and rotate it along the horizontal midpoint crease as a valley fold.

actions.target: left midpoint and right midpoint overlap within visual tolerance
actions.text: Use detected endpoints to align left midpoint with right midpoint while the gripper keeps the base panel fixed.
Press the gripper pad along the horizontal midpoint crease in short segments from left midpoint to right midpoint.
Open the gripper slowly and keep the new valley crease in view.

alignment_target.target: left midpoint and right midpoint overlap within visual tolerance
alignment_target.text: Use detected endpoints to align left midpoint with right midpoint while the gripper keeps the base panel fixed.

anchor_grip.text: Hold the stable panel with one gripper contact on each side of the horizontal midpoint crease.

annotations.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease

checks: The new valley crease is visible on the horizontal midpoint crease.
No boundary edge has moved outside the source square.

crease_press.text: Press the gripper pad along the horizontal midpoint crease in short segments from left midpoint to right midpoint.

landmark_language.center: Use the averaged square center or crossing crease estimate.
landmark_language.corners: Use detected corner points as grasp or alignment targets.
landmark_language.crease_line: Track the commanded edge segment as the crease line.
landmark_language.edges: Track boundary segments between corner points.
landmark_language.midpoint: Compute midpoint contacts from detected boundary endpoints.

executor_profile_definition.name: Two-finger gripper
risk_notes: Narrow gripper contact can rotate the sheet if the opposite panel is not constrained.
Alignment may fail when the fold line is hidden by the gripper jaws.

failure_modes: If the paper slides, re-anchor near left midpoint and repeat the fold slowly.
Two-finger gripper: Narrow gripper contact can rotate the sheet if the opposite panel is not constrained.

fold_direction.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease
fold_direction.text: Pinch the free panel and rotate it along the horizontal midpoint crease as a valley fold.

steps.pre_state: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.

release.text: Open the gripper slowly and keep the new valley crease in view.

steps.title: Add a point centerline valley

actions.text: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.
Hold the stable panel with one gripper contact on each side of the cross diagonal crease.

actions.direction: free panel moves away from the executor over the marked crease
actions.text: Pinch the free panel and rotate it along the cross diagonal crease as a mountain fold.

actions.target: top-right corner and bottom-left corner overlap within visual tolerance
actions.text: Use detected endpoints to align top-right corner with bottom-left corner while the gripper keeps the base panel fixed.
Press the gripper pad along the cross diagonal crease in short segments from top-right corner to bottom-left corner.
Open the gripper slowly and keep the new mountain crease in view.

alignment_target.target: top-right corner and bottom-left corner overlap within visual tolerance
alignment_target.text: Use detected endpoints to align top-right corner with bottom-left corner while the gripper keeps the base panel fixed.

anchor_grip.text: Hold the stable panel with one gripper contact on each side of the cross diagonal crease.

annotations.direction: free panel moves away from the executor over the marked crease

checks: The new mountain crease is visible on the cross diagonal crease.
No boundary edge has moved outside the source square.

crease_press.text: Press the gripper pad along the cross diagonal crease in short segments from top-right corner to bottom-left corner.

landmark_language.center: Use the averaged square center or crossing crease estimate.
landmark_language.corners: Use detected corner points as grasp or alignment targets.
landmark_language.crease_line: Track the commanded edge segment as the crease line.
landmark_language.edges: Track boundary segments between corner points.
landmark_language.midpoint: Compute midpoint contacts from detected boundary endpoints.

executor_profile_definition.name: Two-finger gripper
risk_notes: Narrow gripper contact can rotate the sheet if the opposite panel is not constrained.
Alignment may fail when the fold line is hidden by the gripper jaws.

failure_modes: If the paper slides, re-anchor near top-right corner and repeat the fold slowly.
Two-finger gripper: Narrow gripper contact can rotate the sheet if the opposite panel is not constrained.

fold_direction.direction: free panel moves away from the executor over the marked crease
fold_direction.text: Pinch the free panel and rotate it along the cross diagonal crease as a mountain fold.

steps.pre_state: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.

release.text: Open the gripper slowly and keep the new mountain crease in view.

steps.title: Reinforce star diagonal
